Command.Name: OpenIV Red Circle Error
Command.Title: Unable to Drag and Drop in OpenIV.
Command.Description:
Not being able to drag and drop things via OpenIV can be frustrating. Please try the solutions below to resolve it. 
1. Make sure edit mode is enabled. 
2. Use WinRAR instead of Windows Explorer. 
3. Drag the file to your desktop first and then into OpenIV.
